Meanwhile, EU citizens get nothing. Farmers are neglected, least said about pensioners the better. 

European citizens aren't angry enough at these leaders.

link_metadata.description: The European Union will work on a new Winter Energy Plan for 2026-2027 to stabilise Ukraine’s energy system. The ‘Repair, Rebuild, Restart’ package of €920 million was announced in Kyiv by European Council President António Costa and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen at their meeting with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.  The package will secure the steady flow of electricity across the country and accelerate the decentralised production of renewable energy. The visit marked the fourth anniversary of the Russian full-scale war of aggression against Ukraine. It included a series of meetings, a commemorative memorial service and a Coalition of
